title: Solution Architect
description:
We are seeking an experienced Solution Architect to lead the design and delivery of enterprise-grade digital solutions for Singapore’s Whole-of-Government (WOG) customers. This role provides architectural leadership for large-scale government transformation programmes, working closely with internal teams and enterprise software OEMs to deliver secure, scalable, and future-ready platforms aligned with Singapore’s digital government vision.

Key Responsibilities:

Solution Architecture & Strategy

  • Lead end-to-end solution architecture for enterprise applications including workflow systems, case management, portals, and data platforms.
  • Define scalable, modular, and reusable architectures aligned with government frameworks (GCC, Zero Trust, IM8).
  • Partner with Business Unit leadership to shape technical strategy, roadmap, and delivery outcomes.

OEM & Platform Integration

  • Collaborate with enterprise software OEMs (e.g. ServiceNow, SAS, Elastic, AWS, Azure, GCP) to co-design and integrate solutions.
  • Lead integration of third-party platforms within complex government technology environments.
  • Ensure all solutions meet security, compliance, and architecture standards.

Programme Delivery & Governance

  • Provide technical leadership for complex, multi-agency system integrations.
  • Resolve technical escalations and guide delivery teams through implementation and go-live.
  • Oversee technical handover to operations and support teams.

Stakeholder Engagement

  • Act as a trusted technical advisor to senior government stakeholders.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with customers, partners, and OEMs to ensure consistent delivery of business value.

Requirements:

  • 10+ years’ experience in solution architecture, enterprise platforms, or large-scale digital transformation initiatives.
  • Proven track record delivering complex, integrated enterprise systems, preferably in public-sector environments.
  • Strong experience managing and collaborating with enterprise software OEMs.
  • Deep understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), security standards, and enterprise integration.
  • Experience with AI-enabled and cloud-native solutions is an advantage.
  • Agile / DevSecOps certifications (e.g. Scrum, SAFe, PMP) preferred.

(EA Reg No: 20C0312)
Please email a copy of your detailed resume to qianyu@talentsis.com.sg for immediate processing.
Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Talentsis Pte Ltd is a new-age talent acquisition and staffing service company. The company aims to be a one-stop service to provide a full spectrum of HR related services, including but not limited to the following:

  1. Recruitment and Talent Acquisition
  2. Executive Search
  3. Headhunting
  4. Contract & Flexible Staffing
  5. Manpower Outsourcing
  6. Reskilling & Upskilling
  7. HR Consultancy & Advisory Service


(EA Reg No: 20C0312)
